name: context-to-agent
description: Lightweight MCP bridge for sharing current editor context with desktop agents.

commands.title: Context To Agent: Open VS Code Settings

enumDescriptions: Follow the VS Code display language.
contextToAgent.language.description: Display language for the Context To Agent dashboard.

codex.description: Override the Codex config path. Leave empty to use the platform default.

opencode.description: Override the OpenCode config path. Leave empty to use the platform default.

claudeCode.description: Override the Claude Code CLI config path. Leave empty to use ~/.claude.json.

claudeDesktop.description: Override the Claude Desktop config path. Useful for deployments such as Claude-3P.

contextToAgent.configPaths.description: Optional config file path overrides for built-in agents. Paths may start with ~.
